reviews.title: Cheap but worst stay
reviews.text:
Review about Nha Trang Palace Hotel:
(3 nights stay)

1. I was given a room with twin bed, although I "booked" double bed and put note at the end of the checkout to Agoda. 

2. Check in counter person wants to hold on my passport without letting me to choose to pay deposit of 1million VND. I ask whether can I get my passport because it's important, then he said about the deposit. 

3. Second day afternoon, my room was out of power when I got back. I called and the maintenance team have to come and bring a ladder to my room and switch back the power kick off above the ceiling. It's dark and I am exhausted from work and have to wait for 30 minutes for them to be in my room. 

4. The team for making up my room did not fill in the shower gel, soap, etc but I was fed up to ask, I used my own that I always brought. 

5. There are no iron and iron board or place to iron your clothes, you will be forced to pay for the people to do it for you (laundry team). This is the first hotel I've seen doing this, even cheap/budget hotel have all those items. 

6. The English is not good for all the staff and this makes me having a nightmare often there. 

So please, I am begging you not to stay here. No wonder I got discounts through Agoda, unfortunately I felt like I've been cheated by the hotel.

reviews.title: Trotz allem letztlich gut!
reviews.positives: Das Personal war sehr freundlich und entgegenkommend. Wir waren mit dem Service und den Mitarbeitern sehr zufrieden. Man versuchte unsere Anliegen zu erfüllen. Das Preisleistungsverhältnis ist sehr gut!
reviews.negatives:
Das Hotel ist etwas in die Jahre gekommen. Die Zimmerausstattung ist zweckmäßig aber sehr bieder. Trotzdem hat es uns gut gefallen, da das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis OK war, obwohl ........ das Frühstück unser Problem war!

Das tägliche Frühstückbüffet geht nur bis 09.30 Uhr und bestand zu 80-90% aus typischen vietnamesichen Frühstückgerichten. Es gab aber immer frische Brötchen und Eierspeisen, manchmal auch süße Pfannekuchen, die frisch zubereitet wurden. Leider gab es nur kalten Tee und kalten Kaffee, der für unsere Gaumen nicht genießbar war.

Aber das größte Problem war, dass neben wenigen Hotelgästen jeden Tag größere Gruppen, meistens Damen in schicken vietnamesichen Kleidern, vermutlich als externe Gäste am Büffet teilnehmen durften, um Veranstaltungen mit Ehrungen, Ansprachen und Gesang mit Mikrophone und Lautsprecher durchführten. Das störte uns so sehr, dass wir einige Tage unsers Aufenthaltes nicht mehr zum Frühstück gegangen sind. Die Lautstärke und das Durcheinander im Frühstückssaal war für Aussenstehende nicht zu ertragen.

reviews.title: My review
reviews.text:
Good morning. I want to put my opinion and direct experience in this hotel. We stayed 11 nights in this hotel and not only one night as much tourist written. How is possible to insert a impartial and honest review for only one night. Is incredible!

The pros:

1 - The rooms are very comfortable and large.
2 - The location is very good. Near the ocean and shopping malls.

The contros:

1 - for a 5 ⭐ hotel or 4,5 as Agoda written is not good. The breakfast is poverty and little variety. Always the same food to eat every morning. No fruit (orange, bananas, etc). No yogurt and honey as dessert. No fish and no meat. Only much rices and vegetables.
2 - The gym not good. Only some gym equipment and enough. For a complete training is impossible.
3 - The swimming pool is old and need to maintenance. 
4 - the reception and service personal hotel is not properly gentle and available. The restaurant is written that close to 10 pm and when a evening (were the 9.20 pm) me and my son had asked for a ice cream in restaurant it's denied from personal. The answer is been: is already closed. 9.20 pm evening and is close? What absurd thing.

So, this is my hotel opinion. For long stay is not good but if you stay only one or two nights is okay. The hotel need to update and do maintenance. And the personal must to update.

For me Agoda and other partners before to put a ranking hotel must to verify the hotel condition. Is not possible that a 5 ⭐ hotel or 4,5 as is written in Agoda is this. 

But I 🤔 that for people don't interest the quality in general. 

Arleta Kazimiera Tulinska

reviews.text: Before I start I don't give average or bad reviews but I felt this needed honest feedback. Arrived to check in and the staff could not speak English. No instruction given on beach setup eg towels etc. You need a card at the beach area to get a towel and use the hotel sun beds. The pool area was nice with a great view. The hotel is close to some bars but approximately 1.5km from the good restaurants. The room is large as is the bathroom. The lack of information carried through to no folder in room. No room service menu no laundry info nothing. We had to ask a total of 4 times for information but they couldn't or wouldn't understand us so we gave up. The breakfast buffet was average at best. Couldn't understand fried eggs from omelette It seems to be suited to local or Russian guests which some were quite rude. We couldn't wait to leave and it was a disappointing end to our travels. If using just for sleep then definitely but if wanting more than choose another hotel. Wifi was good.

reviews.title: Old classic
reviews.text:
This is a lovely old hotel in a great location for beach access.  The number of food options around this part of the beach is not so great though.  

The room we booked was a deluxe sea view with balcony which was very comfortable but somewhat dated.  The hot water supply was hit or miss and even non existent at times.  The free wifi had very low bandwidth at times. The shower would flood onto the floor and change to cold when using it.  The flat screen TV was old and had dark spots throughout the screen.

The included free breakfast buffet was appalling.  When I went to the egg station and asked the young man attendant who was sitting playing on his phone for some freshly cooked hot eggs he refused to cook them and insisted I take the cold overcooked ones on the plate sitting there. He then went back to his game and ignored me.  The food quality overall at the buffet was very poor compared all the places I have stayed at in Vietnam.

Would I recommend this hotel to others? Sadly no, nor would I ever stay here again

reviews.title: Well Located but Showing Signs of Neglect
reviews.text:
Stayed at Palace Hotel in Nha Trang and had a bit of a mixed experience.

The hotel itself is only around 14 years old, designed with a blend of classic and slightly dated European-style architecture. I stayed in a double room which was very spacious, and the bed was comfortable with decent pillows.

However, privacy was an issue — with apartments directly opposite (above a shopping mall), keeping the curtains open wasn’t really an option.

The bathroom was a letdown. The shower is positioned over the bath but set back behind a shelf, meaning you have to lean forward awkwardly just to shower properly.

I didn’t try the breakfast as I don’t usually eat in the mornings, but there seemed to be a wide selection available. Unfortunately, the hot coffee was cold when I did check it.

For a relatively modern hotel, it does feel like maintenance and general upkeep have been neglected, especially in the rooms where small touch-ups are clearly needed.

The lift system is frustrating, there are three lifts, but they aren’t connected electronically. You end up pressing all three buttons, and lifts frequently stop on floors where no one is waiting.

WiFi was available in the room, but streaming was poor and constantly buffering. Also worth noting there’s no smart TV, so you can’t easily connect your own streaming services.

On the plus side, the location is great , very close to the beach and convenient for getting around.

Overall, it has potential due to its size and location, but it needs attention to maintenance and some modern upgrades to improve the guest experience.

reviews.title: Nha Trang Palace Hotel
reviews.text:
The Nha Trang Palace Hotel was built somewhere in early 2000.  We stayed 5 nights in a room with balcony and a sea views.  The room was clean and supplied with personal items like Qtips, soaps, shampoo, comb, toothpaste toothbrushes, shavers, shower cap and shoe polish.  The thich towels were very good.  The mattress, pillows and bedding were white and clean.  The room was Dated with old furniture and curtains.  The room needed fresh paint.  Bathroom needed professional caulking instead of a sloppy job.  Breakfast buffet was limited but for the prices we paid better than a lot of hotels that no stars like homestead in Tam Coc or Ho Chi Minh with no Breakf or just eggs and bread.  
The pool is decent.  The tiles around the pool are old.  The   change rooms and washrooms needs updated and clean better.  The carpet in the hallways needs replaced.  
The gym is a sad looking areas.  No mirrors and not a motivation place when looking at old equipments, old room and no views.
I would come back to Nha Trang Palace if the place is remaining decent and better.  Overall, we still enjoyed the huge room, comfortable bed, no smells no mold, no bedbugs  and cleaned.

reviews.title: The cost-effectiveness and location were everything!
reviews.text:
Overall, if you lower your expectations just a bit, this place offers very high satisfaction for the price.

✅ Advantages

Flexible early check-in: Even though I checked out of another hotel and arrived early around noon, they kindly allowed me to check in right away. The staff were generally very friendly, making a good first impression.

Spacious rooms with an open three-sided view: The room and bathroom were very spacious, making for a comfortable stay. The furniture is somewhat old, but in good condition, and you can enjoy views of the sea, city, and mountains all at once, which is very satisfying.

Guaranteed good sleep & ample hot water: There is little internal noise in the room, and the blackout curtains do a great job of blocking light, making it perfect for a good night's sleep. The water pressure and hot water conditions are also excellent.
Optimal layout: The beach is nearby, and Lotte Mart and Dam Market are adjacent, making it the perfect location for shopping and sightseeing.

⚠️ Disadvantages and Precautions

Shower filter is essential: Since it’s an older hotel, you need to consider water quality issues. There tends to be more rust-colored water than in other places, so make sure to bring a shower filter.

Formal gym: There is a gym on the 15th floor, but it is almost used like a storage room, making it impractical for usage. It’s better not to expect much from the exercise facilities.

Simple breakfast: There aren’t many menu options. However, considering the accommodation price, it’s adequate for a light meal.

👥 Guest Composition

The guest ratio seemed to be Chinese > Russian > Korean. It’s okay to enjoy a moderately exotic atmosphere without too many Koreans around.

💡 Overall Review
You do have to tolerate some aging of the facilities, but the spacious rooms, friendly service, and advantageous location are very strong points. I recommend this hotel for travelers who want to enjoy Nha Trang city in a cost-effective way.

Very central for things and so close to the beach that I found a great location as well.
